description: Notifications received via APNs/Firebase Cloud Messaging. Notification payload may contain messages, camera commands, URLs, and action data. Processed by NotificationService extension.

flow_steps.details: Remote notification received via APNs. Forwarded to Firebase Messaging for analytics.

flow_steps.code: override func didReceive(_ request:, withContentHandler:) { Current.notificationHistoryStore.record(...); Current.notificationAttachmentManager.content(from: request.content, api:) }
flow_steps.details: Notification service extension records content to history DB and downloads attachment media from HA server (camera snapshots, etc.).

flow_steps.code: public func userNotificationCenter(_:, willPresent notification:) async -> UNNotificationPresentationOptions
flow_steps.details: Foreground notification processed for display with appropriate presentation options.

description: Push notification with 'kiosk_show_camera' command triggers live camera overlay. Camera entity ID extracted from payload; camera stream rendered via WebRTC/HLS.

flow_steps.code: private func openCamera(from userInfo:) { let view = CameraPlayerView(server: server, cameraEntityId: entityId) }
flow_steps.details: Push notification with 'show_camera' command extracts camera.entity_id from payload.

flow_steps.code: private func cameraEntityId(from userInfo:) -> String? { if userInfo["entity_id"] as? String hasPrefix "camera." }
flow_steps.details: Camera entity ID extracted from notification homeassistant payload.
Camera player view presented as overlay for live camera stream from HA server.

description: Push notifications can update Live Activities (iOS 17.2+). Live activity commands update dynamic island/lock screen content.

flow_steps.code: private static func isLiveActivity(_ userInfo:) -> Bool { (hadict["live_update"] as? Bool) == true || (hadict["command"] as? String) == "live_activity" }
flow_steps.details: Notification payload checked for live activity update flags.
Live Activity start/end commands processed on app foreground.

description: Push commands can set screen brightness, system volume, show/hide camera, and control kiosk mode settings.

flow_steps.code: private func setScreenBrightness(_ level:) { UIScreen.main.brightness = clamped }
flow_steps.details: Push command sets screen brightness level.

flow_steps.code: private func setSystemVolume(_ level:) { slider.setValue(clamped, animated: false); slider.sendActions(for: .touchUpInside) }
flow_steps.details: Push command sets system volume via MPVolumeView.

description: Notification attachments downloaded from HA server URLs and displayed as media attachments within notifications.

flow_steps.details: Attachment media (camera snapshot, etc.) downloaded from HA server for notification display.
